question: [File: 'File Name: rest/service/contractService.js -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: getContractLogs()] Can an unprivileged external user flood the endpoint backed by getContractLogs() with max-limit requests that each trigger RecordFileService.getRecordFileBlockDetailsFromTimestampArray() with a full-page timestamp array, saturating the DB connection pool so that the importer's record-file ingestion queries queue indefinitely, delaying the next block by 500%+ of the 24-hour average block time?
